replies.msg:
所以真正report方法係:
1. 睇一睇條片example: Hong Kong Protests: Irrational Chaos
2. 搵錯處: 如misleading info/選擇性報導: 佢冇報有3000律師反對 但係話有一個professor 話支持
3. 去about/關於, stat下面有支旗仔, report, 填錯處, send
4. 搞掂

搵下文宣聯絡youtube總部 搞搞佢

replies.msg:
多謝你建議，我用拙劣嘅英文打咗篇投訴，希望work la
The title of this video includes the word ‘news’, so I think that it is unacceptable that this video contains misleading information. He only quoted people with the same point of view as him, for example a law professor agreed with the bill. However, there are more than 3000 professionals in the legal aspect disagree with the bill which was not reported in his ‘news’. Moreover, the bill has already been proven to be not a solution to the murder in Taiwan, as the Taiwanese governor openly said that she will not accept the extradition if the condition is to pass this bill first. There is so much misleading information in this video that I cannot quote all of them, i also understand that misleading videos are common on the internet. But I really want to report this case as naming itself ‘news’ without journalism ethics is not acceptable. On top of that, there is no way i can describe why I wanted to report this video with the report button in the iPhone youtube app, I hope youtube can add that function, to listen to the people and I think it can assist decision making.

哇屌下面啲留言
啲人當正佢為真相發聲咁，好噁心

呢D人我喺外國見過, 表面上扮到好左翼, 內𥚃其實好保守, 文化主義者一個
" Culturalism is the idea that individuals are determined by their culture, that these cultures form closed, organic wholes, and that the individual is unable to leave his or her own culture but rather can only realise him or herself within it "

https://www.eurozine.com/culturalism-culture-as-political-ideology/

"On the Left we hear culturalist battle cries calling for the recognition of the most anti-modern and unappetising cultural practices"
